[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 011000000 2
1 100000000 1
2 101000100 3
3 101101000 4
4 000000000 a
5 000000000 a
6 000000000 a
7 100000000 1

01 10 101100000 3
12 21 001000000 1
23 32 001000010 2
34 43 001000000 1

56 65 100010000 2
67 76 101001010 4
70 07 101100000 3

13 31 101111000 5
24 42 011000000 2 match 0

46 64 011000000 2 match 0
57 75 100000000 1 match 1 7

71 17 101101000 4 match 3

36 63 101011010 5
47 74 001000000 1
